creator: andreas.jobs+freebsdbugs@ruhr-uni-bochum.de
text:
Created attachment 254095
port upgrade to 3.20240827

The attached patch updates Mail::Milter::Authentication to 3.20240827. The changes are documented on

    https://metacpan.org/dist/Mail-Milter-Authentication/changes

The updated package runs on one of our MTAs for around 2 weeks processing ~60000 mails/d.
